title: D2.2.3: Methodology for biophysical-biochemical parameters from new EO
subtitle: WP2.2 - EO for monitoring plant status and yield
description: A guide for evaluating methods to retrieve crop and vegetation biophysical and biochemical parameters using new Earth Observation data from Sentinel-2 and other high-resolution platforms. It outlines empirical, physically-based and hybrid inversion techniques for parameters such as crop coefficient, fAPAR, chlorophyll content, nitrogen content and leaf area index, and discusses exploiting spectral, spatial and temporal resolutions.
